title: Single-Molecule FRET-Resolved Protein Dynamics - from Plasmid to Data in Six Steps
author: Vermeer, Benjamin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: SmFRET trace files of 58 yeast Hsp90 molecules (in presence of AMP-PNP) containing raw intensity values through time of acceptor emission after acceptor excitation (r_r_*), donor emission after donor excitation (o_g_*), and acceptor emission after donor excitation (r_g_*).
steps_raw: SmFRET trace files of 58 yeast Hsp90 molecules (in presence of AMP-PNP) containing raw intensity values through time of acceptor emission after acceptor excitation (r_r_*), donor emission after donor excitation (o_g_*), and acceptor emission after donor excitation (r_g_*).
